reviews.comment:
La vista es preciosa, pero eso no es lo que buscamos al parar en una estación de servicio (y más aún del ACA). ES DEPRIMENTE! en un lugar tan inhóspito como el sur, deberían tener una estación agradable, con gente agradable para tomar renovadas fuerzas y seguir viaje!
La atención deja mucho que desear, "despachan" sin ningún tipo de calidez.....

(Translated by Google)
The view is beautiful, but that's not what we're looking for when stopping at a gas station (especially in the ACA). IT'S DEPRESSING! In a place as inhospitable as the south, they should have a pleasant station, with friendly people to recharge our batteries and continue our journey!
The service leaves much to be desired; they "deliver" without any kind of warmth...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3Z3JYSTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
La Estación es hermosa y estratégica porque no hay nada hasta El Bolson y o Bariloche. Luce algo quedada podrían ponerla linda sin perder ese encanto que tiene. Eso si, llama la atención la poca voluntad que le ponen los muchachos...gente, los turistas molestan? algunos si! pero gracias a nosotros se sobrevive el año, pónganle algo de onda si no les faltan el respeto, no hay excusa...., te hacen hacer una sola fila vengas del lado que vengas, una sola persona para surtir y cobrar osea que tenes que ir con paciencia. Obviamente, como en casi todos los lugares del sur, solo efectivo!!! encima, una estación del ACA!!!, lamentable.

(Translated by Google)
The station is beautiful and strategically located because there's nothing else until El Bolsón or Bariloche. It looks a bit neglected; they could spruce it up without losing its charm. However, the lack of effort from the staff is striking... Do tourists bother you? Some do! But thanks to us, the station survives the year. They should put in some effort, otherwise they'll be disrespectful; there's no excuse... They make you form a single line no matter which way you're coming from, and there's only one person to pump fuel and take payment, so you have to be patient. Obviously, like almost everywhere in the south, it's cash only! And on top of that, it's an ACA station! It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3eTdmdUd3EAE
